title: oenothera humboldtii
intro: Oenothera humboldtii, also known as Humboldt's evening primrose, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Oenothera humboldtii include its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support eye health due to its high levels of beta-carotene and lutein. Oenothera humboldtii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
